_note: sidecar tool-annotation registry (config-driven · commons 'rules are data'). Maps MCP tool-name regex patterns to DECLARED hints (the readOnly/destructive/openWorld/sensitive hints the PreToolUse hook payload does NOT carry), then the annotation-guard applies the policy below. Repo override: .harness/tool-annotations.json. Explicit exact-name entries compose with the generic patterns (OR-merge). Tune freely.
